parentRecordId.title: Parent Record Id
parentRecordId.description: The Salesforce ID of the assignee’s account.

goalAssignee.title: Goal Assignee
goalAssignee.description: The contact to which the goal is to be assigned

goalDefinition.title: Goal Definition
goalDefinition.description: The Salesforce record ID of the goal definition.

goalStartDate.title: Goal Start Date
goalStartDate.description: The date from which the goal starts.

goalTargetCompletionDate.title: Goal Target Completion Date
goalTargetCompletionDate.description: The date by which the goal is expected to be completed or achieved.

goalStatus.title: Goal Status
goalStatus.description: Specifies the status of the assigned goal.

goalPriority.title: Goal Priority
goalPriority.description: Specifies the priority of the assigned goal.
